flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Blue Mountain Christian University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (47.3% → 35.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Blue Mountain Christian University fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (619 → 498).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Blue Mountain Christian University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $20.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Blue Mountain Christian University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $20.2k).
